name: AS LHV Group
summary: AS LHV Group, through its subsidiaries, provides banking, security brokerage, financial advisory, finance lease, and other lending services to private and business clients in Estonia. It operates through three segments: Retail Banking, Financial Intermediates, and Corporate Banking segments. The company offers demand and fixed-term deposits; pension investment and securities accounts; home and private, consumer, car, home repair, furnishing, health and beauty, student, micro, working capital, investment, margin, and apartment association loans; and overdrafts, leasing, hire-purchase, guarantees, letters of credit, documentary collection, and factoring services, as well as financing the acquisition of a company. It also provides settlement, institutional brokerage, pension, investment fund, and payment and investment services; banking cards; and investment advice, as well as mobile banking and ATM services. The company was founded in 1999 and is based in Tallinn, Estonia.
